title: Apply paint to vehicle body panels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply paint to vehicle body panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.2 Interpret vehicle colour codes and determine paint type, colour, quality and quantity1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for painting body panel1.4 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.5 Spray gun and air line equipment, and identify and check paint mixing and tinting equipment for serviceability1.6 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.2 Interpret vehicle colour codes and determine paint type, colour, quality and quantity1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for painting body panel1.4 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.5 Spray gun and air line equipment, and identify and check paint mixing and tinting equipment for serviceability1.6 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on 1.2 Interpret vehicle colour codes and determine paint type, colour, quality and quantity1.3 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for painting body panel1.4 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.5 Spray gun and air line equipment, and identify and check paint mixing and tinting equipment for serviceability1.6 Identify potential hazards and risks associated with task and report to workplace supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Tint and mix paint

pcs.text: Calculate paint colour tint requirements to achieve vehicle colour code2.2 Mix paint according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Record paint colour and mixing requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate paint colour tint requirements to achieve vehicle colour code2.2 Mix paint according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Record paint colour and mixing requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate paint colour tint requirements to achieve vehicle colour code2.2 Mix paint according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Record paint colour and mixing requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Tint and mix paint

elements.title: Apply top coat

pcs.text: Apply paint using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to safety and environmental requirements3.2 Dry paint using approved methods and equipment3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure painted surface meets requirements for colour and finish
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply paint using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to safety and environmental requirements3.2 Dry paint using approved methods and equipment3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure painted surface meets requirements for colour and finish?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply paint using manufacturer recommended method and intervals according to safety and environmental requirements3.2 Dry paint using approved methods and equipment3.3 Inspect body panel to ensure painted surface meets requirements for colour and finish.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Apply top coat

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
